text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While out shopping during summer camp, I swing
by the beach shack, when...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Welcome, welcome! How many dining today?
One? Two? Three dozen?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
What else? I'm running a business! How could I
not when this beach house just fell into our laps!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: We're gonna make enough money to renovate this place into a beach palace! In 564 years, they'll be excavating the ruins of it from the seafloor! Right, Nakayama?

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Heh, I wouldn't be surprised, considering you're
involved. Might as well completely rethink how
the world does business too.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I peek inside the establishment but don't find any
of the normal workers around. Did these two
actually take it over?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Y'know what, you came at just the right time!
With you here, this beach family will be
unstoppable!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Not even the pressure of the deep sea could crush
our bond! This family'll be the best there ever
was!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Nakayama's the boss! I'm the struggling student!
That seagull's the heroine who protects us from
the shadows, and you're our beloved paper cup!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Exactly, we gotta develop our menu first! Can't
forget yakisoba noodles with 1,000 times the
garam masala! Right, Boss?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Then there's shaved permafrost and ultimate
anchovy blast dumplings! Whoa, it's like there's a
geyser of inspiration exploding inside me!

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: ...Sure, sounds good. Go crazy.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This makes me nervous in all kinds of ways... but
it's lunchtime, and a horde of students is about to
come rushing over for a meal!

text_block_list.name: Student Customers
text_block_list.text:
"Cascading fireworks tofu"? "Ancient ocean
trench soup"?
Whoa, what kind of food is this? Should we try it?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Excuse me. Your yakisoba was really good,
Golshi... I want it again.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Ahh, you appear before me once more, Stomach
Monster! This time I'll hit you with my
Thousandfold Garam Masala Yakisoba!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Hm?! Wh-what is this?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: ...It's delicious!

text_block_list.name: Student Customers
text_block_list.text:
Wow, it must be good if Oguri likes it!
It's the real deal! Hey, I'll take an order too!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Many thanks! In appreciation for all the business,
we're holding a special for the next 564 seconds!
Free Himalayan-size upgrades for everyone!

text_block_list.name: Student Customers
text_block_list.text: Awesome! Let me get one too!
choice_data_list: Business is taking off like a rocket!

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
I had a hunch it'd be way more interesting to let
her go wild.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Just look at those people skills... I could never
match that.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Boss! Paper Cup! Quit gawking around and
give me a hand! We need the whole family on this
one!

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: Hehe... Coming right up!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We make it through the rush leaving nothing but
satisfied customers! Guess it's time to start
closing up shop...

text_block_list.name: Young Girl
text_block_list.text: S-sorry! Um, I just want to say... thank you!

text_block_list.name: Young Girl
text_block_list.text:
This is my grandpa's store. But he got sick from
the heat...

text_block_list.name: Young Girl
text_block_list.text:
He said since everyone from Tracen was excited
to come, he'd hate to close the store. He was
ready to push himself too hard to keep it open.

text_block_list.name: Young Girl
text_block_list.text: But that's when you two said you'd help out.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Oh, don't get the wrong idea. I didn't pitch in
because I felt bad or anything.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
It's just, the idea of doing something with
someone so unpredictable... sparked my curiosity.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
I'm not into following the rules or getting things
perfect. That's not what makes my heart sing.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! I hope you're ready! Tomorrow we're
hauling out a mikoshi shrine rigged with flashy
lights to draw in more customers!

text_block_list.name: Young Girl
text_block_list.text: Wow! I wanna see that!

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Heh, you're as far from the rules as anyone can
get.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
...In that case, why don't we attach the shrine to a
cart and take this shack on the road?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Ohh, that's great! We can soup it up with those
extra jet engines I've got!

text_block_list.name: Young Girl
text_block_list.text: R-really?! And what else will you do?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
They're really pushing each other outside the
box... Through their cooperation, the beach shack
becomes a big hit during summer camp.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:

One? Two? Three dozen?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
I'm not into following the rules or getting things

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! I hope you're ready! Tomorrow we're
hauling out a mikoshi shrine rigged with flashy
lights to draw in more customers!

text_block_list.name: Young Girl
text_block_list.text: Wow! I wanna see that!

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Heh, you're as far from the rules as anyone can
get.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
But hold up a sec. Since the ocean's right here,
I'm thinking if we're gonna deck something out in
lights, it should be a boat.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Huh? But we can't hook up bulldozer tracks to a
boat! It wouldn't make sense!

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Oh? Then how about we settle this with a
contest? Let's see which reigns
supreme—bulldozer tracks or boat propeller!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Through a little friendly clash between the two,
the beach shack ends up drawing a big crowd
each day after.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship

One? Two? Three dozen?

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa

It's just, the idea of doing something with
someone so unpredictable... sparked my curiosity.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
I'm not into following the rules or getting things
perfect. That's not what makes my heart sing.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! I hope you're ready! Tomorrow we're
hauling out a mikoshi shrine rigged with flashy
lights to draw in more customers!

text_block_list.name: Young Girl
text_block_list.text: Wow! I wanna see that!

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Heh, you're as far from the rules as anyone can
get.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
But, hey, let's cool our jets. I really like your idea
and all, but if we go too far, the beach house
won't be a beach house anymore.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
You just don't get it! The more it evolves, the
more epic it'll be!

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, but it's the old man's place, not ours. I'm
the boss, right? So let me take the helm on this
one.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Nakayama Festa keeps Gold Ship from going too
far, and through their cooperation, the beach
shack turns out a big crowd each day after.
